title: 2pk Microwavable Soup Mugs
features: QUALITY - Our 2pk soup holder set was manufactured using food grade materials, without the use of any harmful chemicals that could contaminate your food. Its plastic construction was designed to not only withstand extreme heat, but also to not crack or break when dropped. They are available in Red, Green, Blue and Grey.

FOR OFFICE and HOME USE - If you're the type who loves to sip on a warm and tasty soup during your work break, then you need to have one of our microwavable soup containers at your office. Compact and easy to clean, it gives you that respite from the daily grind with your own personal cup of warm soup in minutes. Each cup measures in at 11.5 x 12.2 x 9cm making it compact to store inside your desk.

EASY TO USE AND CLEAN - No need to worry about melting plastic that could ruin your microwave, as our 2pk soup containers are absolutely microwave safe. And when you're done, all you need to do is throw it into the dishwasher, and it's ready for your next cup of soup.

SAFETY LID - Our 2pk Microwavable Soup Mug set have four sided lockable lid system that prevents any liquid spillage. This isn't just for keeping those soup from spilling out into the insides of your microwave, but also acts as a safety lid when transporting your soup filled mug from one place to another.
COLOURS- They are available in Red, Green, Blue and Grey (colours will be sent out randomly).
description: Manufactured using high quality and food grade materials, without the use of any harmful chemicals that could contaminate your food. It prevents a messy microwave when cooking, as well as offering protection when walking to and from your desk with your microwave soup bowl.Both microwave safe and dishwasher safe, meaning less hassle when trying to cook or clean with your soup bowl.With two microwave soup bowls with lids included, you always have a spare one handy, or you can keep one at home and at work.
